channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年4月23日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Windows 9x Subsystem for Linux #2 3.4M Solar Panels #3 Our eighth generation TPUs: two chips for the agentic era #4 GitHub CLI now collects pseudoanonymous telemetry #5 Treetops glowing during storms captured on film for first time #6 Show HN submissions tripled and are now mostly vibe-coded #7 Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model #8 The best time to post on Hacker News #9 Columnar Storage Is Normalization #10 Making RAM at Home [video]

item.title: 2026年4月23日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Alberta startup sells no-tech tractors for half price #2 Apple fixes bug that cops used to extract deleted chat messages from iPhones #3 We found a stable Firefox identifier linking all your private Tor identities #4 Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model #5 Over-editing refers to a model modifying code beyond what is necessary #6 5x5 Pixel font for tiny screens #7 Windows 9x Subsystem for Linux #8 The Illuminated Man: an unconventional portrait of JG Ballard #9 Ping-pong robot beats top-level human players #10 Website streamed live directly from a model

I remember MS-DOS
